title: Solar Storage Microgrid Dispatch
summary: An urban-energy notebook for PV, battery dispatch, tariff exposure, peak shaving, and resilience comparison.
description: This case adapts mature PyPSA/PV/storage planning patterns to a compact local microgrid dataset and solves dispatch scenarios offline.

datasets.name: Bundled offline analysis dataset
datasets.description: Project-local inputs generated for a reproducible mature workflow.

steps: Load a week-long demand, PV, temperature, tariff, and critical-load dataset.
Diagnose load shape, solar coincidence, ramps, and price exposure.
Build a baseline grid-import cost and emissions inventory.
Formulate a storage dispatch optimization with state-of-charge constraints.
Solve multiple PV and battery scenarios with scipy/HiGHS-style linear programming.
Compare cost, peak import, PV curtailment, and resilience metrics.
Allocate benefits across districts using peak-share and critical-load weights.
Export dispatch schedules, scenario tables, and visual diagnostics.
expectedResults: Cost, emission, peak, and resilience comparison table.
references: PyPSA optimal power flow docs: https://docs.pypsa.org/
